title: cleome chilocalyx var. tenuifolia
intro: Cleome chilocalyx var. tenuifolia, also known as the 'narrow-leaved spider flower,' is a plant species that belongs to the Cleomaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Cleome chilocalyx var. tenuifolia include reducing inflammation and combating infections. Herbal preparations involving the plant may include infusions, teas, and extracts, which can be used to support various health conditions.
